sys_update_version.payload: truefalsefalsedesktop,tablet,mobileviewportdefault1{ "mobile": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "desktop": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "tablet": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" } }<!-- AngularJS template with configurable options. Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior. Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemde5783ba7c363f2501bf5fe1d050131ed8679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceyeabsira2026-03-17 12:52:0739be387bc3abf2501bf5fe1d050131922bddbbacec3abb6101bf5fe1d050131c9bddbbacec3abb6101bf5fe1d050131c9sp_instance_39be387bc3abf2501bf5fe1d05013192yeabsira2026-03-17 12:55:44<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<div class="hero-banner"> <div class="hero-content"> <h1>Welcome to SmartCare Hospital</h1> <p>Your health, our priority. Request services, book appointments, and access health resources — all in one place.</p> <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="?id=sc_home"> Request a Service</a> <a class="btn btn-default btn-lg" href="?id=appointment_home"> Book Appointment</a></div> </div> <style> .hero-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #003366 0%, #006D77 100%); padding: 80px 40px; text-align: center; border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px; } .hero-banner h1 { color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; } .hero-banner p { color: #D5E8F0; font-size: 1.1em; margin-bottom: 32px; } .hero-banner .btn-primary { background:#F5A623; border:none; margin-right:12px; } .hero-banner .btn-default { color:#FFFFFF; border:2px solid #FFFFFF; background:transparent; } </style>", "displayValue": "<div class="hero-banner"> <div class="hero-content"> <h1>Welcome to SmartCare Hospital</h1> <p>Your health, our priority. Request services, book appointments, and access health resources — all in one place.</p> <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="?id=sc_home"> Request a Service</a> <a class="btn btn-default btn-lg" href="?id=appointment_home"> Book Appointment</a></div> </div> <style> .hero-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #003366 0%, #006D77 100%); padding: 80px 40px; text-align: center; border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px; } .hero-banner h1 { color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 16px; } .hero-banner p { color: #D5E8F0; font-size: 1.1em; margin-bottom: 32px; } .hero-banner .btn-primary { background:#F5A623; border:none; margin-right:12px; } .hero-banner .btn-default { color:#FFFFFF; border:2px solid #FFFFFF; background:transparent; } </style>" } }]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=39be387bc3abf2501bf5fe1d05013192"/></record_update>
